traits.name: False Appearance
traits.description: If the swarm is motionless at the start of combat, it has Advantage on its Initiative roll. Moreover, if a creature hasn't observed the swarm move or act, that creature must succeed on a DC 15 Wisdom (Perception) check to discern that the swarm isn't a collection of severed hands.

traits.name: Swarm
traits.description: The swarm can occupy another creature's space and vice versa, and the swarm can move through openings large enough for a Tiny creature. The swarm can't regain Hit Points or gain Temporary Hit Points.

actions.name: Claw
actions.description: Melee Attack Roll: +4, reach 0 ft. Hit: 14 (4d6) Necrotic damage, or 7 (2d6) Necrotic damage if the swarm has half its Hit Points or fewer. Creatures damaged by the swarm can't regain Hit Points until the end of their next turn.

tactical_info.tactics: Uses false appearance for surprise, swarms enemies to prevent healing, focuses on weakened targets
tactical_info.weaknesses: Vulnerable to area damage, reduced damage at half hit points, blind beyond 60 feet
